scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface & markings**: The asphalt road in the immediate foreground shows cracks. Yellow double solid lines run along the right edge of the image (toward the right side of the road). A blurred, indistinct patch (likely from the camera’s motion) appears at the bottom center.  

- **Bollards**: On the left edge, two short, vertical yellow bollards are visible near the grassy verge.  

- **Text & signs**:  
  - A green rectangular street sign (Latin script) with white text reading "HANNA" (top) and "AVE" (bottom) is mounted on a wooden pole in the left mid-foreground.  
  - Below the street sign, a white octagonal stop sign (back visible, no text) with a wooden post is positioned slightly to the right of the street sign.  

### Mid-ground  
- **Road surface & markings**: The road curves gently to the right, with the same asphalt surface and visible cracks extending into the mid-ground. The yellow double lines continue along the right edge.  

- **Infrastructure**:  
  - A wooden utility pole (left foreground) with multiple crossbars and several overhead power lines. Insulators are visible on the pole.  
  - Further along the left side of the road, a metal street lamp with a single arm and a cylindrical lamp head is visible (mid-left background).  
  - Additional wooden utility poles are present in the mid to far background (one near the center-left, another further right).  

- **Buildings & architecture**:  
  - A single-story house with a light-colored facade and pitched roof is visible in the center background, on a grassy area.  
  - To the right of the house, a smaller structure (e.g., shed) is partially visible.  

- **Vegetation & terrain**:  
  - The left side of the road features a grassy field with tall evergreen (coniferous) trees and dense vegetation (tall grasses and shrubs).  
  - The right side of the road also has a grassy area with a mix of tall evergreen trees, deciduous trees (some with green and yellowing leaves), and dense shrubs.  
  - The terrain is flat, with open fields extending beyond the trees.  

### Background  
- **Road surface & markings**: The road narrows as it extends into the background, with the same asphalt surface and cracks.  
- **Infrastructure**: More wooden utility poles and power lines stretch into the far background.  
- **Vegetation & terrain**: Dense tree lines (a mix of coniferous and deciduous) and open fields continue in the background, with a partly cloudy sky above.  

### Other elements  
- No vehicles, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails, or fences are visible.  
- The sky is mostly clear with scattered white clouds.  
- The road appears to be for right-hand traffic (no visible lane markings indicating left-hand traffic).

details.name: green street sign
details.reason: Readable text 'HANNA AVE' in Latin script can help identify the language and region.
details.focused_description: A green rectangular street sign with white text displaying "P.R. 367". The sign has a green background, white lettering in Latin script, and is in a rectangular shape. The material appears to be typical for road signs (e.g., metal or plastic). The text is clearly visible, with "P.R." followed by a space and "367".

details.name: yellow road lines
details.reason: Yellow edge lines on the road are a specific marking style used in certain countries.
details.focused_description: Two parallel yellow lines on asphalt road surface; color is yellow; shape is straight (slight curvature due to road); material appears to be paint; condition shows some fading but remains visible; no text present.

details.name: yellow bollards
details.reason: The presence of short yellow bollards can be a specific regional infrastructure clue.
details.focused_description: A yellow cylindrical bollard, vertically oriented. No visible text. Colors: yellow. Shape: cylindrical. Material: indeterminate due to image blur. Condition: no visible damage. No markings.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The design of the crossbars and insulators on the pole can help identify the region.
details.focused_description: The wooden utility pole is a tall, vertical structure with a rectangular cross-section. It is weathered, exhibiting a grayish-brown color with darker patches, indicating exposure to the elements. The material is wood, showing a rough texture. A dark vertical line or cable runs along one side of the pole. No text is visible on the pole.

details.name: metal street lamp
details.reason: The specific shape of the lamp head and arm can assist in regional identification.
